snippet: Explore Middle Tennessee real estate with Coldwell Banker Southern Realty. With offices in Nashville , Lawrenceburg, Mount Juliet, Murfreesboro, and Gallatin, our expert agents are ready to assist with buying or selling homes, condos, and land.
subject: Peregrine Realty Group / Principal Broker Opportunity
body:
Hi Coldwellbankersouthernrealty team,

I'm building Peregrine Realty Group around a live distress-origination and controlled deal-flow system, and I'm looking for the right principal broker relationship to structure the brokerage side correctly from the beginning.

The underlying origination engine and partner-facing distribution layer already exist. What I'm looking for now is the right principal broker and office home to serve as the appointed principal broker, host the brokerage under an established office, oversee brokerage compliance and supervision, and help ensure the operation is structured correctly from the start.

This is not meant to be a passive license arrangement. I want the brokerage built on a real supervisory and compliance foundation.

On economics, I'm open to structuring it the right way for the right fit, but the basic framework would be principal broker oversight and hosting, plus revenue share tied to brokerage-side deal flow generated through Peregrine.

If this is something you'd be open to discussing, I'd value a short conversation.

Best,
Patrick Yuri Armour
FALCO
https://falco.llc
query: Middle Tennessee managing broker real estate firm Nashville
